description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Tuesday, March 24, graduation certificate presentation ceremonies were held at elementary schools throughout the city. I attended the Hanno Municipal Okutamusashi Elementary School graduation ceremony as a guest and delivered congratulatory remarks.

Dear graduating students, congratulations on your graduation.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13364.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Graduation Ceremony at Okutamusashi Elementary School, Fiscal Year 2025 (Reiwa 7)
